idea-plugin.name: CodeSetu
idea-plugin.description:
Open-source AI coding assistant for JetBrains IDEs. Multi-provider — works with Sarvam, OpenAI-compatible APIs (Ollama, vLLM, OpenRouter), and local self-hosted deployments. Built for Indian developers, public-sector teams, and air-gapped enterprises.

This plugin is in early scaffold. Source: github.com/getcodesetu/codesetu · Community: Discord
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial JetBrains plugin scaffold
  • Adds CodeSetu menu group with a placeholder "Open Chat" action
